user_query: I'm participating in a quiz competition and I need practice questions. Fetch all multiple-choice and true or false questions with answers and feedback from the Tech Exams API. Additionally, provide a fact about a day of the year, June 21st, and a fact about the year 1492.

TaskList.description: Fetch multiple-choice and true or false questions from the Tech Exams API along with their answers and feedback.
Retrieve a fact about the year 1492.
